images.prompt:
A realistic campus lifestyle photo for a post about cilantro preferences: a fresh bowl of noodles with cilantro leaves set beside a notebook on a cafeteria table. Natural light, no readable text, no logos.

Style requirements: Create a realistic, original smartphone photo suitable for a campus lifestyle social post. Avoid readable text, logos, watermarks, brand names, UI screenshots, and copyrighted characters. Use natural lighting and a clean composition.
